title: Neon Genesis IMPACTS A short video
display_title: Neon Genesis IMPACTS A short video
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by SuperUltraMecha » Tue Dec 20, 2016 6:55 pm https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=Iv5qc0RpBk0 I found this short film online that ties into the rebuilds, I was wondering if this is canon or not.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Dec 20, 2016 7:04 pm It's #32 of the series of shorts produced by Khara under the general direction of Anno with the title "Japan Animator Expo". It is not canon as part of any Evangelion series as far as is known; there are a couple of others that have close connections to Evangelion, though, including one with animation supposedly taken from the removed last section of Evangelion 3.33 "Q". There's a big thread on the whole series here , and this video is discussed starting from this page here .

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Dec 23, 2016 2:07 am It's weird because the animation style is so different but the uniforms & setting seem to be Tokyo-3 ish complete with students leaving all the time. The girls seem younger than the Children too, or maybe it's just the art. Or they're in a parallel class, the kids aren't referenced but It seems like something of a 'lower decks episode', or a gene shift like a super cute music anime but the sitting is still itself. Are we to understand that she's crushed by a falling EVA in the end or that these are the events at the end of 2.22? I think I heard something like the lance piercing sounds. Them talking about a future that will never come sure drives the horror home.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Dec 23, 2016 10:56 pm Not a fan of this Animator Expo short in the least. I found the song atrociously bland, the animation ugly (background art is stellar though & truly deserving of praise), the story lacking in emotion & the three main characters unbearably annoying. All in all I felt it was one of the weakest entries in the otherwise wonderful Animator Expo from Studio Khara. Of course, I did like it when the lead squeaky girl died in the end.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Dec 24, 2016 10:30 am I'm not against the whole idea of shorts and I think this is a good one saying that though the tone feels far to happy to carefree I'm not saying that the kids wouldn't have fun but I think if the angels were coming and impacts were a thing I see there being a real sense of foreboding since your world could end in a heartbeat.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Dec 25, 2016 1:27 pm Kendrix wrote: Are we to understand that she's crushed by a falling EVA in the end or that these are the events at the end of 2.22? I think I heard something like the lance piercing sounds.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Apox » Sun Dec 25, 2016 3:04 pm So this supposedly happens in 2015, however in the rebuilds there is evidence pointing that the series takes place in 2017.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Dec 25, 2016 5:19 pm That is a common conclusion (and the one I used in dating my related fic), but I don't think it's entirely unambiguous. And if the animators of the short got it wrong, so what, really? Even if they'd worked on Rebuild , on a few people would even need to know dates in detail.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 26, 2016 5:30 pm What evidence is there that the Rebuilds take place in 2017? Unless there are things I've missed over the past decade I thought the Rebuilds went out of their way to not set the story in a given year. Am I wrong?

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 26, 2016 5:42 pm This link refers back to this one - there's a calendar shown whose day/date combinations only work in 2017 (for 1.11, placing 2.22 in 2018). There's also this discussion . But honestly it's as likely that someone just didn't think to check the calendar, so the date could really remain vague.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis IMPACTS ( A short video )             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 26, 2016 5:49 pm Huh. I had no idea. Very interesting...
